candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related amortization line, but it is blank in the excerpt and there is no separate amount to add.

Although this is the explicit COGS-related depreciation line, the selected parent row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' appears to already include it because 'Cost of Revenues - Unclassified' plus this depreciation equals the selected total COGS row.

variables.notes: Do not add separate COGS D&A. The selected COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' is a total that already embeds 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues'. 'Amortization in Cost of Revenues' is blank.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is a separate SG&A D&A line above operating profit and it appears outside the selected XSGA bucket. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Unclassified' plus 'Research & Development Expense'; their sum excludes this depreciation line, while together with this depreciation they reconcile to 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the other explicit SG&A D&A-type row, but it is blank in the excerpt, so there is no separate amount to add.

variables.notes: CHANGED MANUALLY. Add only the separate SG&A depreciation row. Do not add R&D-related D&A separately because R&D is already explicitly selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, and no distinct populated 'Amortization in R&D' row is present here. The SG&A amortization row is blank.
